chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1032 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.08.2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh O R D E R Perusal of the order of this Court dated 30.07.2024 reflects that the petitioners have approached this Court, praying that completion certificates be awarded to the petitioners who have already completed the tendered works. Urgency is shown that since it is rainy season hence there is likelihood that the entire works would be washed away by rains, therefore, the respondents be directed to issue completion certificates forthwith so that payments could be pocketed. When posed with the question as to the maintainability of instant petition, which specifically deals with the factual controversy as to what works were awarded to the contractors, how much of the same was completed by the later, what reports thereon were furnished by the Survey Supervisor, therefore, approaching this Court in a harry to have the bills released, does not satisfy a prudent mind. The controversy is purely factual in nature for which appropriate remedy would be to file a Suit which could be decided after recording of evidence as to the above facts. In similar circumstances guidelines emanating from the judgment of the Hon’ble Supreme Court are also as such. We, therefore, do not find any Constitutional merits in this petition, which is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
